# User Stories

## Format

"As a **[persona]**, I want **[goal]** so that **[benefit]**."

## Acceptance Criteria Guidelines

Each user story should have clear acceptance criteria:
- Specific and measurable
- Testable
- Agreed upon by stakeholders
